sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33611" key="e)leuqero/glwssos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλευθερό-γλωσσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free of speech</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:16:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
